scripts.build: cd rust/claude-core && cargo check --quiet && cd ../.. && node --check scripts/dashboard_web/app.js && node --check scripts/dashboard_web/live-system.js
scripts.test: cd rust/claude-core && cargo test --quiet && cd ../.. && bash tests/test-project-audit.sh && bash tests/test-dashboard-db-repair.sh && bash tests/test-token-usage-normalize.sh
scripts.lint: cd rust/claude-core && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings 2>/dev/null; node --check scripts/dashboard_web/app.js
